task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet application (e.g., Excel) is open displaying the 'commercial_circuits.xlsx' file with columns for circuit details like Length, Load, System Voltage, etc.

task_completion.description: Populate the Resistance (Column H) with values from NEC Table 8
task_completion.visual_evidence: Column H contains numerical resistance values corresponding to the wire size and material (e.g., 3.14 for 14 AWG Copper, 3.25 for 12 AWG Aluminum).

task_completion.description: Calculate the Voltage Drop in Column I
task_completion.visual_evidence: Column I contains numerical values representing the calculated voltage drop. The formula bar may show a formula similar to =(2*Length*Resistance*Load)/1000.

task_completion.description: Calculate the % Drop in Column J and format as a percentage with 2 decimal places
task_completion.visual_evidence: Column J contains percentage values formatted to exactly two decimal places (e.g., '2.45%'). The formula bar may show Voltage Drop / System Voltage.

task_completion.description: Populate the Status in Column K with 'PASS' or 'FAIL'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Column K contains the text 'PASS' or 'FAIL' for each circuit row. 'FAIL' should correspond to rows where Column J is greater than 3.00%.

task_completion.description: Highlight 'FAIL' cells with a red background
task_completion.visual_evidence: Cells in Column K that contain the word 'FAIL' have a red background fill color.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a spreadsheet GUI (like Microsoft Excel) rather than writing a script to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Excel interface being actively used (e.g., ribbon, formula bar, cell selection) rather than a terminal running a Python/Pandas script.

integrity.description: The agent used spreadsheet formulas or features to calculate the values rather than typing in pre-calculated text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The formula bar shows actual formulas (e.g., referencing other cells) when a calculated cell is selected, rather than hardcoded numbers.

integrity.description: The agent applied actual cell background fill color for the highlighting requirement.
integrity.visual_evidence: The red color is applied to the cell background (fill), not just changing the text/font color to red.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target file is C:\Users\Docker\Documents\commercial_circuits.xlsx containing 50 circuits (rows 2-51). Resistance values must come from NEC Table 8 (stranded conductors at 75°C), e.g., 14 AWG Copper = 3.14 Ω/kft, 12 AWG Copper = 1.98 Ω/kft, 14 AWG Aluminum = 5.15 Ω/kft, 12 AWG Aluminum = 3.25 Ω/kft. Compliance limit is 3.00% (0.03); values strictly greater than 3.00% must be marked 'FAIL' and highlighted with a red background.
